steps.t: Hoary aurochs are said to roam in the Misty Mountains. Redtusk is said to forage near Torech Braignel in north-east Eregion. Hrotha requires the hides…

Sálvakh dwells in Carn Dûm in Angmar. Dushkâl, Brízrip, and Thordragh can be found at Urugarth in Angmar. Hrotha needs the third and final set of item…
